holdings.infoBox: DIVG is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Conagra Brands stock at 2.47%, HP Inc. at 2.47%, Franklin Resources at 2.28%, Altria Group at 2.10%, and VICI Properties at 2.07%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 High Dividend Growers ETF (DIVG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 High Dividend Growth index. The fund tracks a yield-weighted index of 100 companies in the S&P 500 with the highest forecasted dividend yield growth. DIVG was launched on Dec 6, 2023 and is issued by Invesco.
